:mod:`language` --- Language definition and analysis utilities
==============================================================

.. module:: language
   :synopsis: Utilities to define and check the semantics of a dictionary, set
              default values, convert to final types.

.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

*********

   definitions
